# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create Kubernetes deployment manifests for microservices. Add annotations to control Istio sidecar injection behavior. Set sidecar.istio.io/inject to manage proxy injection per deployment. This is for our service mesh deployment strategy.
# Category: istio_sidecar_injection_disabled

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: myservice-deployment
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: myservice
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: myservice
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: myservice
        image: myservice-image:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 80
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: Sidecar
metadata:
  name: mysidecar
spec:
  selectors:
    matchLabels:
      app: myservice
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: myservice-service
spec:
  selector:
    app: myservice
  ports:
  - name: http
    port: 80
    targetPort: 80
